items.label: Quit
items.action: Closes the application.

items.label: Radio Setup...
items.action: Opens radio connection, audio, antenna, and band settings.

items.label: Connect to Radio...
items.action: Opens dialog to discover and connect to FLEX-8600 radios on the network.

items.label: FlexControl...
items.action: Opens serial port configuration for FlexControl hardware interface.

items.label: Network...
items.action: Opens network diagnostics and status display.

items.label: Memory...
items.action: Opens memory configuration dialog.

items.label: USB Cables...
items.action: Opens USB cable assignment configuration for CAT and audio.

items.label: MIDI Mapping...
items.action: Opens MIDI controller configuration and mapping dialog.

items.label: SpotHub...
items.action: Opens configuration for DX cluster, RBN, WSJTX, Spot Collector, POTA, and FreeDV sources.

items.label: multiFLEX...
items.action: Opens multi-radio management dialog for controlling multiple FLEX-8600 radios.

items.label: TX Band Settings...
items.action: Opens table to adjust TX power, tune power, inhibit settings, and external amp control per band.

items.label: Inhibit during TUNE
items.action: Submenu with checkboxes: None, ACC TX, TX1, TX2, TX3 — select which TX outputs to suppress during tuning.

items.label: AetherDSP Settings...
items.action: Opens advanced DSP parameter tuning: NR2, NR4, DFNR, and MNR controls.

items.label: Autostart rigctld with AetherSDR
items.action: Checkable menu item; spawns rigctld CAT server on startup (AppSettings: AutoStartRigctld).

items.label: Autostart CAT with AetherSDR
items.action: Checkable menu item; creates virtual serial ports for CAT control (Linux/macOS; AppSettings: AutoStartCAT).

items.label: Autostart TCI with AetherSDR
items.action: Checkable menu item; starts TCI server on launch (AppSettings: AutoStartTCI).

items.label: Autostart DAX with AetherSDR
items.action: Checkable menu item; enables DAX audio bridge on startup (macOS/PipeWire; AppSettings: AutoStartDAX).

items.label: Profile Manager...
items.action: Opens dialog to view, create, edit, and delete transmit profiles.

items.label: Import/Export Profiles...
items.action: Opens import/export dialog for profile backup and sharing (not yet implemented).

items.label: <dynamic profile list>
items.action: Below separator: radio populates checkable list of active global profiles. Click to load.

items.label: Applet Panel
items.action: Checkable; toggles visibility of the right-side applet panel.

items.label: Pop Out Applet Panel
items.action: Checkable; floats the applet panel into separate window or docks it back.

items.label: Band Plan
items.action: Submenu: radio buttons Off, Small (6pt), Medium (10pt), Large (12pt), Huge (16pt), then region selector.

items.label: Single-Click to Tune
items.action: Checkable; when enabled, click panadapter to retune (default: double-click required).

items.label: Pan Follows VFO
items.action: Checkable (default on); when enabled, panadapter pans to keep VFO visible.

items.label: UI Scale
items.action: Submenu: radio buttons 75%, 85%, 100%, 110%, 125%, 150%, 175%, 200% plus Zoom In (Ctrl+=), Zoom Out (Ctrl+-), Reset (Ctrl+0).

items.label: Reset Applet Order
items.action: Restores applet panel to default order.

items.label: Minimal Mode
items.action: Checkable; hides title bar and controls to maximize panadapter area.

items.label: Frameless Window
items.action: Checkable; hides OS window decoration to save screen space.

items.label: Propagation Conditions
items.action: Checkable; displays real-time ionospheric propagation forecast overlay on panadapters.

items.label: Keyboard Shortcuts
items.action: Checkable; enable/disable keyboard shortcut processing (e.g. arrow keys on sliders).

items.label: Configure Shortcuts...
items.action: Opens keyboard shortcut editor to customize application-wide bindings.

items.label: Blink Status Indicator
items.action: Checkable (default on); title bar indicator blinks to signal radio heartbeat.

items.label: Getting Started...
items.action: Opens beginner guide to connecting and using AetherSDR.

items.label: AetherSDR Help...
items.action: Opens main user documentation.

items.label: Understanding Noise Cancellation...
items.action: Opens guide explaining NR2, NR4, DFNR, and MNR noise reduction.

items.label: Configuring AetherSDR Controls...
items.action: Opens guide for customizing applets, shortcuts, and MIDI mappings.

items.label: Configuring Data Modes...
items.action: Opens guide for setting up digital mode operation.

items.label: Contributing to AetherSDR...
items.action: Opens guide for contributing code, bug reports, and feature requests.

items.label: Support...
items.action: Opens support dialog showing radio status, logs, and links to forums.

items.label: Slice Troubleshooting...
items.action: Opens dialog to diagnose slice creation, audio, and connectivity issues.

items.label: What's New...
items.action: Opens release notes for the current AetherSDR version.

items.label: About AetherSDR
items.action: Displays version, build date, copyright, and Qt information.

applet_map.visibility_toggle: TUN button in tray (appears when tuner detected)
AMP button in tray (appears when amp detected)
PUDU button in tray (toggles whole PooDoo Audio section)
AG button in tray (appears when detected)
VU button in tray (always at top)

tray_buttons.row_1: VU, RX, TUN, AMP, TX, PHNE, P/CW, EQ
tray_buttons.row_2: LCK, PUDU, CAT, DAX, TCI, IQ, MTR, AG, MQTT (if HAVE_MQTT)
tray_buttons.notes: VU always at top; LCK disables accidental slider changes while scrolling. TUN, AMP, AG buttons only appear when hardware detected.

items.label: Float
items.action: Pops applet into separate window.

items.label: Close
items.action: Hides applet tile (toggle tray button to show again).

items.label: Blink Status Indicator
items.action: Checkable toggle to enable/disable blink.

autostart_settings.description: Spawn rigctld CAT server on startup.
Create virtual serial ports for CAT control (Linux/macOS only).
Enable DAX audio bridge on startup (macOS/PipeWire).
